Glossary

Natural gas products
Interactive data tools
Summary
Natural Gas Monthly
Monthly volumes and prices of natural gas consumption by sector, as well as production, storage, imports and exports, and weather
Natural Gas Annual
Annual volumes and prices of natural gas consumption by sector, detailed state-level production, interstate movements, imports and exports, and state summary profiles
Exploration and production
U.S. Oil and Natural Gas Wells by Production Rate
State-level data on well distribution by size and technology and analysis of emerging trends
U.S. Crude Oil and Natural Gas Proved Reserves
Data on crude oil production (including lease condensate) and natural gas production (gross withdrawals)
Storage
Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report
Regional weekly estimates of natural gas in underground storage for the lower 48 states.
Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report Supplement
Companion publication to the Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report (WNGSR) and provides key highlights of the natural gas sector.
Underground Natural Gas Working Storage Capacity
Calculations of underground natural gas storage capacity and explanation of how changes in storage capacity relate to market circumstances
The Basics of Underground Natural Storage
Overview of how natural gas is stored, who owns and operates the storage facilities, how to measure storage, and what EIA resources to consult for more information
Transportation and LNG infrastructure
Pipelines data
Detailed information and maps showing U.S. pipelines, capacities, flows and network design, and transportation corridors, as well as data on the U.S. state-to-state capacity of existing natural gas pipelines and data on the size and location of pipeline projects announced or under construction
U.S. liquefaction projects
Detailed information on the size and location of U.S. LNG export projects (existing, under construction, and approved)
